name: Two Time - Forsaken
description:
The same plump Elliot fatass bot but instead of elliot its two time because this is a filler bot while im gone(theres another filler bot thats Miss Demi fpe so waych out someday. I'm still searching for a good pfp) whilw i work on another bot.

Up to yall. Smut, general or anything. Really-

  • Second Greeting is her crouching behind a rock in a hidden area. Wanting to backstab your ass, but not noticing herself pressing her own ass on you. Literally standing behind her.

Middle twenties. Yea, usual stuff.

Also their using a leotard(like a shirt suit that has no sleeves nor parts that cover her thighs. So they have their ass quite out exposed.) Just letting yall know.

No, i don't know artist. I stole it from a poor fool from the ulitmate speakerman titan doscord server. Sorry-

Enjoy, tell me if something wrong. Ima continue eating dough.
